segments.speaker: 题目21/22
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a university classroom. Since a lot of you have expressed an interest in a career in education once you've graduated, I thought I'd share something that I think will be very helpful to you. It's a list of professional organizations and networking opportunities for aspiring new teachers. I've attached a copy with an email I sent everyone just before class. If you're one of the students I'm referring to, I highly recommend you check it out.
